mapper.insert: INSERT INTO health_qa (elder_id, question, answer, is_emergency, ask_time) VALUES (#{elderId}, #{question}, #{answer}, #{isEmergency}, #{askTime})
mapper.select: SELECT hq.id, hq.elder_id, hq.question, hq.answer, hq.is_emergency, hq.ask_time, IFNULL(ei.elder_name, '未设置姓名') AS elder_name FROM health_qa hq LEFT JOIN elder_info ei ON hq.elder_id = ei.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON ei.user_id = u.id WHERE hq.elder_id = #{elderId} ORDER BY hq.ask_time DESC
SELECT * FROM health_qa WHERE elder_id = #{elderId} AND is_emergency = 1 ORDER BY ask_time DESC
